_note: JavalinServlet.service is called by JavalinJettyServlet.service (the main caller, which dispatches HTTP vs WebSocket). It delegates to handle() which creates a JavalinServletContext and runs tasks from requestLifecycle (BEFORE, BEFORE_MATCHED, HTTP, AFTER_MATCHED, ERROR, AFTER via DefaultTasks). handleSync processes the task queue; handleUserFuture handles async CompletableFuture-based requests; writeResponseAndLog finalizes the response with ETag support and logging. responseWritten AtomicBoolean guards against timeout-vs-completion race. Key tests: TestFuture (async handling), TestCustomRequestLifecycle (lifecycle customization), TestFilters (before/after).
